signals.headline: US, Iran Eye Fresh Talks Before 2-Week Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US, Iran Eye Fresh Talks Before 2-Week Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**

No new ceasefire confirmation, announcement, or resolution today (April 14, 2026); instead, reports indicate ongoing discussions for a second round of negotiations in Islamabad before the existing 2-week ceasefire—announced April 7—expires early next week, amid a US blockade on Iranian ports in the Strait o

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.16-2.2% YoY, Up Slightly from 2.0% but Below Forecasts | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.16% in March 2026 from 2.00% in February, with monthly inflation at 0.34%; this missed market expectations of 2.4% and remains near the Bank of Korea's 2% target.[1][2]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.7% YoY, Up Sharply from 1.9% on Energy Spike | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's annual inflation accelerated to 2.7% in March 2026 from 1.9% in February, matching preliminary estimates and the highest since January 2024, driven by a 7.2% energy price surge including 20% in fuel.[3]  

No breaking GDP announcements for South Korea or Germany confirmed
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: 2026 FIFA World Cup Groups Finalized After Draw Completion | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
2026 FIFA World Cup Groups Finalized After Draw Completion | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The 2026 FIFA World Cup final draw has been completed, locking in all 12 groups for the tournament starting June 11, including **Germany** in **Group E** with Curaçao, Ivory Coast, and Ecuador.[4][5] Top two teams per group plus the eight best third-place teams advance to the Round of 32; all groups show 0 point

Will Switzerland win Group B in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
